growth_records.medium: Sodium carbonate/bicarbonate soda mineral medium with thiosulfate

up.method: polarographic O2 uptake, Tm. aerophilum, 100% rate (Fig 2)
electron donor; specific uptake rate not tabulated

sec.method: end product of thiosulfate oxidation; rate not tabulated

growth_records.cite: Dimitry Y. Sorokin et al. The Microbial Sulfur Cycle at Extremely Haloalkaline Conditions of Soda Lakes. Frontiers in Microbiology (2011). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2011.00044. [PMC3128939]
growth_records.snippet: Maximal specific growth rate 0.33 h-1 ... Maximal growth yield with S2O3^2- 3.5 mg protein mmol-1 (Table 2). 100% rates were ... 3.8 umol O2 (mg protein min)-1 for Tm aerophilum (Fig 2).
growth_records.notes: Review-compiled, genus-aggregate values (Table 2). mu_max reported 0.33 h-1; doubling_time=ln2/0.33=2.1 h (calculated). Yield 3.5 mg protein/mmol thiosulfate. pH optimum 9.5-10.0 (midpoint 9.75). O2 uptake 3.8 umol/mg protein/min is specifically for Tm. aerophilum (Fig 2; =228 mmol O2/g protein/h). Values from authors' prior work (Sorokin et al. 2000-2007); temperature not stated. Upper salt limit 1.5 M Na+.
